title: Galaxy Clouds Sky Overlay
description: Blue, purple, and pink sky overlay!
body:
**Pack Overview:**

This resource pack replaces the sky with a depiction of pink, blue, and purple clouds!

**Requirements:**

For this resource pack to perform properly, you must use Optifine or any other mods that allow custom skies.

**Minecraft Settings:**

Custom skies: On

Sky: Off
**_If skybox doesn't work, relaunch Mineraft_**
